message:
fix: respect --json flag in palette subcommand

runPalette() unconditionally launched the TUI, ignoring the global
--json flag that every other subcommand (hooks, workflows, kernel)
checks. Now when --json is passed, palette outputs JSON via
robot.PrintPalette() instead of launching the interactive TUI.

Closes #36

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
